name: Room Clener
description: The Room Clener is a hard-hitting close-quarters shotgun built around overwhelming pellet volume rather than consistency. Its spread is wildly erratic, but at point-blank range enough pellets usually connect to drop ordinary enemies in one or two blasts. It works best as a burst tool or execution weapon, since the recoil, awkward follow-up shots, and long reload make sustained use clumsy and expensive.
notes: Random world drop from suitable loot sources. It uses the Bandit barrel, so it only appears at green rarity or higher. Its closest Scav counterpart in Borderlands: The Pre-Sequel is the Firehose. The name is a misspelling of Room Cleaner. Without an accessory or elemental capacitor, it can spawn with the prefix Threpul Bareld, itself a misspelling of Triple Barrelled. Its accuracy can roll so low that the displayed stat becomes negative.
